creator: christiangutzler@gmail.com
text:
Hi Daisy, that workaround worked since the server rejected messages from clients with older user agent strings while the protocol itself had not changed too much for most activities to work. 

In the meantime, many changes to the protocol have happened, e.g. group format so one could not create (and join, if I remember correctly) groups according to new standard (v2).

I guess Linuxulator is the way to go now (but have not checked whether it works due to lack if interest).
